svg.title: IoT automatic weight dispensing system — block diagram
svg.desc: Block diagram showing Load Cell feeding into HX711, then Arduino Nano as the central controller connected to MAX7219 display, L298N motor driver, and RS485 bus. RS485 links to ESP8266 which communicates with the IoT cloud.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What power supply is needed for this system?')
sendPrompt('How does the load cell measure weight?')
sendPrompt('What is the role of Arduino Nano in this system?')
g.text: D2 D3 D4 D5 D7 D8 D10 D11 D13
Reads weight · drives motor · RS485 comms

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the MAX7219 LED matrix display work?')
sendPrompt('How does RS485 communication work between Arduino and ESP8266?')
sendPrompt('What is the role of ESP8266 in this IoT system?')
sendPrompt('Why does ESP8266 have its own RS485 module?')
sendPrompt('How does L298N motor driver control the DC motor?')
sendPrompt('What type of DC motor is used for dispensing?')
sendPrompt('What IoT cloud platform does the ESP8266 connect to?')
